creator: anarcat+register@orangeseeds.org
text:
[CC'ing freebsd-ports, i hope this is appropriate..]

On Sun, Apr 29, 2007 at 06:38:01AM +0000, Li-Wen Hsu wrote:
> http://people.freebsd.org/~lwhsu/nagircbot-0.0.20.log .  This port can't
> be built on 5.x, could you fix it?  I think you can fix it easier than
> me.  Thanks.

Hmm... that's too bad... the bug is related to pidfile.c missing in
libutil in FreeBSD 5.x. I don't exactly know what the right approach
here is: should I copy the file in the FILESDIR as a patch for now?

Or should I just reimplement it upstream?

I guess it's all the same, but I'd like to have advice from other
porters before hacking at this...

Thanks,

-- 
Antoine Beaupré
Réseau Koumbit Networks
+1.514.387.6262
